texto: As far as an actor-director connection, I think those can develop, and when they do, they're really great, and you just cultivate it like you would any relationship or friendship. If you find that something special, it helps down the line when you want to do more projects with each other.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Taylor Handley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “As far as an actor-director connection, I think those can develop, and when they do, they're real…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, relationship, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e great.

frase_original: As far as an actor-director connection, I think those can develop, and when they do, they're really great, and you just cultivate it like you would any relationship or friendship. If you find that something special, it helps down the line when you want to do more projects with each other.
